No caption was sent with the image.

Read the image carefully, then classify it and extract key fields. Respond with ONLY this JSON structure:
{
  "classification": "payment_proof" | "expense_proof" | "unrecognised",
  "amount_pkr": <number or null>,
  "payment_method": "bank_transfer" | "cash_deposit" | "unknown" | null,
  "deposit_slip_ref": "<string or null>",
  "description": "<one line summary in English>"
}

Rules:
- payment_proof: a deposit slip, transfer screenshot, or cheque showing money paid to IRBAS.
- expense_proof: a receipt/bill for something the RO paid for (repair, fuel, utility, purchase).
- unrecognised: anything that is not a payment or expense proof.
- amount_pkr: the main transaction amount as a plain number (450000 not "450,000"); null if not visible.
- deposit_slip_ref: the slip/reference/transaction number printed on the proof; null if none.","image_url",{"url":"194"},"message","file_share","C0BBEAW2N77","U07IMG01",["195"],"slack","F0IMG1","https://placehold.co/760x420/png?text=Payment+to+IRBAS%0APKR+312,500%0ASlip+2026-0420","image/png",{"type":"177","subtype":"178","channel":"179","user":"180","text":"61","files":"196"},"6ac583e2-5c4c-4b49-841a-4fd87199a9e7",{"text":"61","type":"177","user":"180","files":"197","channel":"179","subtype":"178"},"2026-06-22T11:59:55.649455+00:00","pending",{"mimeType":"185","fileType":"198","fileExtension":"199","data":"200","directory":"184","fileName":"199","id":"201","fileSize":"202","bytes":18035},{"role":"140","content":"141"},{"role":"142","content":"203"},"data:image/png;base64,filesystem-v2",{"id":"183","mimetype":"185","url_private":"184","url_private_download":"184"},["204"],["205"],"image","png","filesystem-v2","filesystem-v2:workflows/c2W3ZYwZj6LsdKwQ/executions/28/binary_data/79baf23c-6c81-4e63-8fd9-207019467709","18 kB",["206","207"],{"id":"183","mimetype":"185","url_private":"184","url_private_download":"184"},{"id":"183","mimetype":"185","url_private":"184","url_private_download":"184"},{"type":"173","text":"174"},{"type":"175","image_url":"208"},{"url":"194"}]

parameters.jsCode:
const text = $node['Extract Fields'].json.message_text || '';
const hasImage = ($node['Extract Fields'].json.media_id || '') !== '';

const system = "You are a classifier for messages sent by Pakistani Regional Office accountants in a WhatsApp business group. You must respond with ONLY valid JSON — no explanation, no markdown, no backticks. Just the raw JSON object.";

const user = [
  'Classify the following message into exactly one category and extract key fields.',
  '',
  'Message: "' + text + '"',
  'Has image attached: ' + hasImage,
  '',
  'Respond with ONLY this JSON structure:',
  '{',
  '  "classification": "payment_proof" | "expense_proof" | "unrecognised",',
  '  "amount_pkr": <number or null>,',
  '  "payment_method": "bank_transfer" | "cash_deposit" | "unknown" | null,',
  '  "deposit_slip_ref": "<string or null>",',
  '  "description": "<one line summary in English>"',
  '}',
  '',
  'Classification rules:',
  '- payment_proof: message mentions payment, transfer, deposit, amount sent to IRBAS account',
  '- expense_proof: message mentions expense, repair, purchase, bill, petrol, utility paid by the RO',
  '- unrecognised: anything else (greetings, announcements, questions)',
  '',
  'Amount extraction rules:',
  '- Pakistani formats: 450,000 or 4.5 lac or 4.5 lakh or 450000 are all valid numbers',
  '- Extract deposit slip or reference numbers if mentioned (e.g. slip number 2024-1847)',
  '- If no amount visible, return null'
].join('\n');

return [{ json: {
  model: 'llama-3.1-8b-instant',
  temperature: 0,
  max_tokens: 300,
  messages: [
    { role: 'system', content: system },
    { role: 'user', content: user }
  ]
} }];
